title: Haste
description: an insanely minimal shader that runs extremely fast while improving visuals
body:
# Haste

### This shader is archived, but you can use a better alternative that i made here:
- https://modrinth.com/shader/aerosol

Haste is a shader that enhances lighting without any heavy impact on gameplay or visuals

Haste uses high dynamic range colors to get a result thats brighter and more vibrant

It has
- Better lighting with fake sharp shadows
- High dynamic range color processing
- Sphere radius fog

Is planned
- Better looking water
- Sun and moon glow
- Sky reflections on reflective materials
- Other fixes and improvements
